2026-02-26JUSNunavut ActOrder Appointing the Hon. Vanessa V. Christie, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of JusticeOrder appointing the Honourable Vanessa V. Christie, a judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.N/A
subject: Order Appointing the Hon. Vanessa V. Christie, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice
precis: Order appointing the Honourable Vanessa V. Christie, a judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.
